form.formComment: Solid run when beaten by 1.5 m finishing second after a quick start, behind Beaudiene Hunter at this track over 2130m in a 4yo+ NR 55 to 59 on March 31 at $6. Then a handy effort when beaten by 8 m finishing second behind Diamond Bay at Bunbury over 1609m in a 4yo+ NR up to 59 M on April 4 at $4. Hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait in the later stages of the score up.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into ninth behind South Side Story at this track over 2130m in a 4yo+ NR 60 to 68 on March 31 at $23. Performed better the start before with a solid effort when 2nd (Sr4) over 1684m at Pinjarra beaten a nose by Gelsomino Amal (2:04.40) in 4yo+ 1-3 WINs M on March 23 at $2.90. Better run anticipated this time.

form.formComment: Last start 9th (Fr2) over 1177m after showing early pace at Pinjarra, beaten 22 m by Beatitlikebeca (1:22.50) in NR up to 55 on March 30 at $26. Two runs back 3rd (Fr2) over 2130m at this track beaten 11 m by Kinky (2:35.80) in 4yo+ NR up to 60 on March 24 at $41. This looks a far sterner test.

form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, 7th (40m Fr1) over 2503m at this track, beaten 14 m by Brewery Lane (3:16.60) in NR up to 80 on March 31 at $81. Before that was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr6) over 2100m at Bunbury, beaten 18 m by Hotfoot It (2:35.80) in 4yo+ NR 55 to 60 on March 28 at $12. Would prefer to see a return to form before recommending.
